languages.text: Гигантские статуи императора которые фцнкционируют как опоры и как факельные свечи

traits.locale_text: Гигантские статуи императора которые фцнкционируют как опоры и как факельные свечи

languages.text: Кажется, будто огромный титан держит платформу на плечах. И, судя по тому, как стремительно вода пожирает сантиметр за сантиметром его тела, — не справляется.

traits.locale_text: Кажется, будто огромный титан держит платформу на плечах. И, судя по тому, как стремительно вода пожирает сантиметр за сантиметром его тело, — не справляется.

languages.text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.
languages.original_text: Кажется, будто огромный титан держит платформу на плечах. И, судя по тому, как стремительно вода пожирает сантиметр за сантиметром его тела, — не справляется.

traits.locale_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on his shoulders. And judging by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of his body, he cannot last much longer.
It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.
It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on his shoulders. And judging by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of his body, he cannot last much longer.
It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on his shoulders. And judging by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of his body, he cannot last much longer.
It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

languages.text: 就好像有个巨型泰坦正用双肩托举着整个平台，可那水流正飞快地一寸寸吞没它的身体。照这势头，它撑不了多久。
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: 就好像有个巨型泰坦正用双肩托举着整个平台，可那水流正飞快地一寸寸吞没它的身体。照这势头，它撑不了多久。

languages.text: Es como si un inmenso titán mantuviera la plataforma sobre sus hombros. Y, por la velocidad con la que el agua devora su cuerpo centímetro a centímetro, no puede aguantar mucho más.
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: Es como si un inmenso titán mantuviera la plataforma sobre sus hombros. Y, por la velocidad con la que el agua devora su cuerpo centímetro a centímetro, no puede aguantar mucho más.

languages.text: C'est comme si un gigantesque titan portait la plateforme sur ses épaules. Et à en juger par la rapidité avec laquelle les eaux engloutissent son corps, il ne résistera guère plus longtemps.
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: C'est comme si un gigantesque titan portait la plateforme sur ses épaules. Et à en juger par la rapidité avec laquelle les eaux engloutissent son corps, il ne résistera guère plus longtemps.

languages.text: Sanki devasa bir titan, platformu omuzlarında taşıyor. Suyun bedenini santim santim hızla yutmasına bakılırsa daha fazla dayanamaz.
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: Sanki devasa bir titan, platformu omuzlarında taşıyor. Suyun bedenini santim santim hızla yutmasına bakılırsa daha fazla dayanamaz.

languages.text: Es scheint, als würde ein riesiger Titan die Plattform auf seinen Schultern tragen. Und angesichts des Wassers, das seinen Körper rasend schnell Zentimeter um Zentimeter verschlingt, wird er wohl nicht mehr lange durchhalten.
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: Es scheint, als würde ein riesiger Titan die Plattform auf seinen Schultern tragen. Und angesichts des Wassers, das seinen Körper rasend schnell Zentimeter um Zentimeter verschlingt, wird er wohl nicht mehr lange durchhalten.

languages.text: 巨大な巨人たちがこのプラットフォームを肩で支えているように見えます。そして、水は、この巨人の体から、1センチメートル、1センチメートルと、急速に食いつき、この巨人は、もう長くは持たないでしょう。
languages.original_text: It is as though a huge titan is supporting the platform on its shoulders. And by the way the water is rapidly devouring centimetre after centimetre of its body, it cannot last much longer.

traits.locale_text: 巨大な巨人たちがこのプラットフォームを肩で支えているように見えます。そして、水は、この巨人の体から、1センチメートル、1センチメートルと、急速に食いつき、この巨人は、もう長くは持たないでしょう。
